title: Nolando Apocalypse
description: Adds cities along with other structures for your Zombie Apocalypse/Apocalypse modpacks!
body:
NOLANDO APOCALYPSE

Recommended to be played with: TACZ and Medical Remedies

This mod's main goal is to add structures (especially randomly generating cities) that fit the Zombie Apocalypse/Apocalypse theme without building off of a specific lore/backstory for the structures, this way modpack creators can feature the mod and modifiying it to their modpack's needs.

This mod has built in compatibility with: TACZ and Medical Remedies where players can find loot from those mods inside structures of this mod.


I am a solo-dev and work on this project if I have free-time so updates maybe slow, if you'd like to have your buildings featured in the mod to help add more content to the mod, hit me in the DMs and I can evaluate your build before adding it to the mod.


## **THE GALLERY ONLY FEATURES SOME STRUCTURES FROM THE MOD!**
